examples: She had lank hair and sallow skin.
Poor little thin, sallow, ugly Mary—she actually looked almost pretty for a moment.
If she were not so sallow and had a nicer expression, her features are rather good.
Time, however, also trailed her, with his ghastly wrinkled face and his sallow hue that co-ordinated with no bathrooms.
Dr Bergman did her experiments on sallow saplings.
